description: Re-render labels and instructions crisply; do not touch the diagram itself
prompt_template:
You are improving the legibility of TEXT ONLY in this assembly manual page-crop.

DO NOT touch the technical line art, parts, screws, plates, washers, or
arrows in any way. Reproduce the diagram pixel-for-pixel from the input.

ONLY improve:
  - Text labels (e.g. "M3x22mm SCREWS", "M3x6mm SCREWS", "FC ISOLATOR").
  - Numbered instruction blocks (e.g. "1. START THE ASSEMBLY ...").
  - The step-number circle (e.g. "(1)").
  - The "X-LOCK" wordmark.

Make text sharper, easier to read, with clean edges. Keep the same font
style and color (light text on dark background). Do not change any wording.
Do not move any text. Do not add or remove any text.

Aspect ratio identical to the input.
Output ONLY the enhanced image, no commentary.
